cookieDescription: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic and personalize content. You can accept all, reject non-essential or configure your preferences.
legalPrivacyIntro: In compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 on Personal Data Protection (LOPDGDD), we inform you about the processing of your personal data.
legalPrivacyDataIntro: We collect the following personal data:
legalPrivacyBasisConsentDesc: For sending commercial communications and non-essential cookies.
legalPrivacyBasisContractDesc: For order management and repair service provision.
legalPrivacyBasisLegitimateDesc: For service improvement and fraud prevention.
legalPrivacyRecipientsIntro: Your data may be shared with the following third parties:
legalPrivacyDPODesc: You can contact our Data Protection Officer at:
legalPrivacyAEPDDesc: If you believe your data is not being processed in accordance with regulations, you can file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at
legalTermsIntro: These general terms and conditions govern the commercial relationship between the user and the company through this website.
legalTermsPricesChange: Prices may change without notice, but confirmed orders maintain the price at the time of purchase
legalTermsPaymentDesc: We accept the following payment methods:
legalTermsShippingFree: Free shipping for orders over 25 EUR
legalTermsWithdrawalPeriod: You have 14 calendar days from receipt of the product to exercise your right of withdrawal without providing any reason.
legalTermsWithdrawalConditions: The product must be returned in its original condition, unused and with complete packaging. Return costs are borne by the consumer, unless the product is defective.
legalTermsWarrantyDesc: All consumer products have a 2-year legal warranty under European regulations. During the first 12 months, any defect is presumed to have existed at the time of delivery.
legalTermsReturnsStep1: Contact us by email with your order number
legalTermsReturnsStep2: We will send you a return label
legalTermsReturnsStep3: Ship the product in its original packaging
legalTermsReturnsStep4: The refund will be processed within 14 days of receipt
legalTermsLiabilityDesc: The company shall not be liable for indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of products or services, except in cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence.
legalTermsLawDesc: These conditions are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts of
legalNoticeIntro: In compliance with Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following identification data of the owner of this website is provided.
legalNoticeIPDesc: All website content (text, images, logos, source code, graphic design, trademarks) is owned by the company or used under license. Reproduction, distribution, public communication or transformation without express authorization is prohibited.
legalNoticeDisclaimerAvailability: The company does not guarantee permanent availability of the website and shall not be liable for temporary service interruptions.
legalNoticeDisclaimerAccuracy: The information on this website is general in nature and may contain unintentional typographical errors.
legalNoticeDisclaimerLinks: The company is not responsible for the content of third-party websites linked from this page.
legalCookieIntro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how we use them and how you can manage them. This policy complies with Spanish (LSSI-CE) and European (GDPR) regulations.
legalCookieWhatDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember your preferences, analyze site usage and improve your browsing experience.
legalCookieEssentialDesc: Required for basic site operation. Includes session, authentication (Firebase Auth) and PWA cache.
legalCookieAnalyticsDesc: Sentry for performance monitoring with 10% sampling. Helps us detect errors and improve the experience.
legalCookieFunctionalDesc: Language preference (i18next). Allows remembering your language selection between sessions.
legalCookieManageDesc: You can configure your cookie preferences through the cookie banner that appears when visiting the site. You can also modify your browser settings to block or delete cookies.
legalCookieDisableDesc: You can disable cookies from your browser settings. Here is how to do it in the main browsers:
checkoutAcceptPrivacy: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
checkoutTermsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions
checkoutPrivacyRequired: You must accept the privacy policy
dataDeletionDescription: Use this form to exercise your data protection rights. We will respond within 30 days in accordance with applicable regulations.
dataDeletionTypeErasureDesc: Request complete deletion of all your personal data.
dataDeletionTypeRestrictionDesc: Request that the use of your personal data be limited.
dataDeletionTypePortabilityDesc: Receive your data in a structured, commonly used format.
dataDeletionTypeRectificationDesc: Correct inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
dataDeletionDetailsPlaceholder: Briefly explain your request or specify the data involved...
dataDeletionErasureWarningDesc: Data deletion is irreversible. Your account, order history, addresses and preferences will be deleted. Data required for legal obligations (invoices, 5 years) will be retained in accordance with the law.
dataDeletionConfirmIdentity: I confirm that I am the data subject or their authorized representative.
dataDeletionConfirmConsequences: I understand that the deletion of my data is irreversible and that I will lose access to my account and associated services.
dataDeletionSuccessDesc: We have received your request. In accordance with the GDPR, we will respond within 30 days. You will be notified at the email address provided.
dataDeletionInfoAEPD: If you are not satisfied with our response, you can file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.
newsletterDescription: Receive exclusive offers, product news and tech tips directly in your inbox.
newsletterConsentMarketing: I agree to receive commercial electronic communications from [NOMBRE_EMPRESA] about products, offers and news in accordance with Art. 21 of the LSSI-CE.
newsletterConsentThirdParty: I agree to receive communications from selected partners related to technology and accessories.
newsletterErrorConsent: You must agree to receive commercial communications
newsletterSuccessDesc: Thank you for subscribing. In accordance with the LSSI-CE, you can unsubscribe at any time through the link included in each email.
newsletterLegalNotice: Controller: [NOMBRE_EMPRESA]. Purpose: sending commercial communications. Legal basis: data subject consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR and Art. 21 LSSI-CE). You can withdraw your consent at any time. More information in our Privacy Policy.
ageVerifySubtitle: Minor data protection - GDPR Art. 8 / LOPDGDD Art. 7
ageVerifyDescription: To protect minors' personal data in accordance with the GDPR, we need to verify your age before proceeding.
ageVerifyErrorDate: You must enter your date of birth
ageVerifyErrorParental: Minors under 16 need parental or guardian consent
ageVerifyParentalWarning: Minors under 16 need parental consent under Art. 7 of the LOPDGDD.
ageVerifyParentalConsent: I confirm that I have the consent of my parent or legal guardian to create an account and process my personal data.
ageVerifyMinorDesc: Under the GDPR and LOPDGDD, minors under {{age}} cannot create an account without verifiable consent from their parent or legal guardian.
ageVerifyMinorContact: If you are a minor and need access:
ageVerifyMinorStep1: Ask your parent or guardian to contact us
ageVerifyMinorStep3: The guardian must provide verifiable consent
ageVerifyLegalNote: This verification is performed under Art. 8 of the GDPR (EU 2016/679) and Art. 7 of the LOPDGDD (LO 3/2018). The data entered is not stored and is used solely for age verification.

legalReturnsIntro: In compliance with Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007, we inform you of your rights regarding returns and refunds.
legalReturnsWithdrawalPeriod: You have 14 calendar days from receipt of the product to exercise your right of withdrawal, without needing to provide any reason.
legalReturnsWithdrawalHow: To exercise this right, you must notify us of your decision by a clear statement (e.g., an email) to:
legalReturnsCondition1: The product must be in its original condition, unused, and with all packaging and labels intact.
legalReturnsCondition2: Returns will not be accepted for products that have been unsealed for hygiene reasons (e.g., screen protectors already applied).
legalReturnsCondition3: Customized or made-to-order products cannot be returned unless they have a manufacturing defect.
legalReturnsCondition4: Included accessories (manuals, cables, adapters) must be returned together with the product.
legalReturnsStep1: Contact us by email with your order number and reason for the return.
legalReturnsStep2: You will receive confirmation and shipping instructions within 48 business hours.
legalReturnsStep3: Send the product properly packaged to the address we provide.
legalReturnsStep4: Once received and verified, we will process the refund.
legalReturnsRefund1: The refund will be processed within 14 calendar days from receipt of the returned product.
legalReturnsRefund2: The same payment method used for the original purchase (Stripe) will be used.
legalReturnsRefund3: The refund will include the product price. Original shipping costs will only be refunded if the return is due to our error or a defective product.
legalReturnsShippingCost: Return shipping costs are borne by the consumer, except in the following cases:
legalReturnsShippingException1: Defective or damaged product upon arrival.
legalReturnsShippingException2: Product different from what was ordered.
legalReturnsDefectiveDesc: If you receive a defective or damaged product during transport:
legalReturnsDefective1: Notify us within 48 hours of receipt.
legalReturnsDefective2: Attach photographs of the product and packaging.
legalReturnsDefective3: We will offer a product replacement or full refund, at your choice.
legalReturnsDefective4: Return shipping costs will be covered by us.
legalReturnsWarrantyDesc: All products intended for consumers have a legal warranty of 3 years. During the first 2 years, any lack of conformity is presumed to have existed at the time of delivery, unless proven otherwise.
offerFirstPurchaseDesc: This discount will be automatically applied to customers making their first purchase.
storesSectionSubtitle: No appointment needed · We repair while you wait
storesSectionFooter: We repair iPhone · Samsung · Xiaomi · All brands — 3-month warranty
repairStartSubtitle: Choose your nearest store and ask us on WhatsApp — we'll reply right away.
localUrgentDesc: Cracked screen or phone not charging? Bring it to our {{city}} store right now. No appointment needed.
localPricesDisclaimer: * Indicative prices. Final price depends on model. Free no-obligation quote.

localShopOnlineDesc: Cases, chargers, cables and accessories with fast delivery across Spain. You can also pick up in store in {{city}}.
